delegationFee.description: The percentage of total estimated delegator rewards allocated to validator nodes for supporting delegations.

stakePercentage.description: The percentage of this validator's stake amount to the total active stake.

delegatorCount.description: The number of delegators linked to the validator.

amountDelegated.description: The total amount in nAVAX delegated to the validator.

uptimePerformance.description: The validator's uptime percentage, as observed by our internal node and measured over time.

delegationCapacity.description: The amount of stake in nAVAX that can be delegated to this validator.

potentialRewards.description: Estimated rewards for the validator if the validation is successful.

geolocation.description: The geographical location of the validator node, if available.
